description: Sector-specific screening controls for South African healthcare providers, health facilities, health data, clinical services, health products, and health-sector regulated documents.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Health Sector Compliance Overlay. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Health Act, 2003
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Department of Health

primary_sources.name: Medicines and Related Substances Act, 1965 and SAHPRA mandate
Health Professions Act, 1974 and HPCSA framework
Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013 (POPIA)
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

primary_sources.name: Occupational Health and Safety Act, 1993
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Department of Employment and Labour

rules.title: Patient confidentiality and health-record privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for patient confidentiality, health record privacy, POPIA, consent, or health information disclosure controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Health facility, professional, or service authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for health facility licence, professional registration, HPCSA, practice number, or authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: SAHPRA product, clinical-trial, manufacturer, distributor, or medicine-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for SAHPRA registration, medicine registration, clinical trial approval, manufacturer/distributor licence, or medical-device controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Clinical, facility, worker, or infection-control safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for infection prevention, occupational health and safety, clinical safety, adverse event, or facility risk controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Patient rights, consent, complaint, or redress evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for patient rights, informed consent, complaint procedure, access to records, or redress evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
